title: Leucophrys psammophila
taxonomy: Leucophrys psammophila is a species of bee-orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Leucophrys psammophila is a type of orchid native to Western Australia. The species is further classified within the genus Leucophrys, which is a group of bee-orchids. Within the Orchidaceae family, Leucophrys psammophila is a member of the Asphodelloideae subfamily.
